plugins.name: repo-visuals
plugins.description: Designs bespoke GitHub README hero visuals — animated GIF or static PNG — through a structured discovery dialog. Retina capture, scope-matched copy, optional upstream PR.

plugins.name: repo-doctor
plugins.description: Audits a GitHub repo's README against best-practice patterns and produces a prioritized punch list (P0/P1/P2) of fixes — hero presence, install-to-first-success length, audience-jargon match, drift signals. Read-only diagnostic by default.
